title: sagenia difformis
intro: Sagenia difformis is a plant species, also known as the Rough Horsetail, which belongs to the family Equisetaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Sagenia difformis include treating urinary tract issues, such as kidney stones and bladder problems, as well as reducing inflammation and swelling in the body. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal use, and is often combined with other herbs for enhanced health benefits.
